params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token with "This creature can't block."Then for each Rat you control, create a Wicked Role token attached to that Rat. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. When this Aura is put into a graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life.)
